name: Prenatal Depression Screening Codes
description: CPT, HCPCS, and quality measure codes for prenatal and postpartum depression screening. Used in the prenatal depression screening and follow-up (PND-E) measure to identify screening performed during pregnancy and postpartum period.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Brief emotional/behavioral assessment with scoring and documentation, per standardized instrument
Screening for clinical depression, documented as positive, and follow-up plan documented
Screening for clinical depression is documented as negative, a follow-up plan is not required
Screening for clinical depression not documented; patient not eligible
Administration of patient-focused health risk assessment instrument with scoring and documentation
Administration and interpretation of health risk assessment instrument
Edinburgh Postnatal Depression Scale (EPDS) total score
